data.body: PLANS: E2(d125) PASSED, E6(a880) PASSED, E3(def5) round-7 (2 easy blocks fixed: source=local + replay_index). All three non-entangled experiment plans review-clean/near. R6(#760) CI: 4th Verified-1 (recheck #5 posted) — SAME flaky concurrency tests (enrich-queue prune write-loss race; code-review sidecar git-object race; benchmark commit-count int('')). They PASS locally + R7(#761) passed Verified+1 on the identical stacked tree, so high-rate CI-load flakes, NOT real failures, plausibly aggravated by identity-rollout signing centralization. ESCALATION-WORTHY: this flaky CI blocks not just R6/R7 landing but EVERY future R-story too (all need Verified+1); if recheck #5 fails, the flaky main tests need a human fix/quarantine (out of this epic's scope). R7 fully green, stuck behind R6 in the stack.
